hero.title: SUNREF
hero.subtitle: CÔTE D'IVOIRE
hero.description: Finance your energy transition and contribute to sustainable development in Côte d'Ivoire

about.title: WHAT IS SUNREF CÔTE D'IVOIRE?
about.text1: The commitments made at COP 21, entitled "Nationally Determined Contributions", and published in 2016, set the goal of reducing Greenhouse Gas emissions by 28% between 2014 and 2030. The Ministry of Petroleum, Energy and Renewable Energy Development (MPEER) thus plans to increase the share of renewable energies in the energy production mix to 42%.
about.text2: It is in this context that the SUNREF Côte d'Ivoire program, a green finance program, intervenes, which aims to promote private sector investments for the benefit of the Ivorian energy transition through the combined deployment of a suitable and incentive technical and financial offer. Its complementary purpose is to promote the sustainable competitiveness of Ivorian companies through energy management.
about.objectivesTitle: THE SPECIFIC OBJECTIVES OF THE PROGRAM
about.objective1: Strengthen awareness among companies of different sizes about the benefits of EE and RE investments, with a focus on the most energy-intensive sectors
about.objective2: Foster the development of a reliable local technical services offer adapted to different needs and project scales
about.objective3: Provide partner banks with technical, financial and commercial upgrading on EE and RE issues in the private sector
about.objective4: Enable partner banks to build a pilot portfolio of EE and RE investments, and support them in defining their own green finance sector
about.objectivesNote: These objectives help create an ecosystem favorable to the development of green energy projects in Côte d'Ivoire

stats.title: SUNREF IN FIGURES
stats.feature1Desc: A team of experts accompanies you at every stage of your project

program.title: THE SUNREF CÔTE D'IVOIRE PROGRAM
program.subtitle: Includes a specific and innovative financial offer and technical support
program.offer1Desc: A credit line made available to partner banks, with privileged partnership conditions for financing green investments in the energy efficiency and renewable energy sector
program.offer2Desc: Technical assistance for companies and banks to support them in:
program.offer2Item1: Identifying investment opportunities in targeted areas
program.offer2Item2: Structuring and monitoring investment projects and selecting the most suitable technologies
program.offer2Item3: Tailored assistance according to the size and complexity of the project
program.offer3Desc: An envelope of investment grants intended for the Borrower's beneficiary clients for the implementation of Eligible Investments.
program.imageTitle: Invest in the sustainable future of your company
program.imageDesc: Adapted solutions for each energy efficiency and renewable energy project
